A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

- Python version (`python --version`):

## Input

Paper that triggered the bug (title + link, or redacted snippet). If it's a PDF parsing issue, please attach the PDF or a minimal reproducer.

## Logs / stack trace

```
paste full stack trace here
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, config diffs, related issues.
